title: genista decumbens
intro: Genista decumbens, also known as prostrate broom or low broom, is a shrub species in the legume family, characterized by its prostrate or decumbent habit and small yellow flowers. Traditionally, Genista decumbens has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Genista decumbens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its active compounds to be extracted and utilized for medicinal purposes.
